title: Rumor Table
content:
1d10
1 - Parents are worried about their youngsters catching a disease from the feral cats roaming the city. The children say that the cats speak to them and send them on quests on their behalf (True)
2 - The Etrousan refugees have been stealing and eating the pets of innocent cityfolk (False)
3 - Food is becoming harder and harder to come by with the cathedral giving more and more food to refugees. (True)
4 - A crazed man has been yelling that he saw a dragon fly overhead southwards in the dead of night. (True)
5 - The Refugees have been polluting the river with their filth, creating a problem with the crop harvest. (False)
